description: A design change is required after a drawing has already been issued. A formal DCN must be created to track the change.

nodes.task_description: Create a new DCN in the system, linking it to the affected drawing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a new DCN record.

nodes.task_description: Describe the change and the reason for it.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer clearly documents the required change.

nodes.task_description: Submit the DCN for approval. Once approved, the DCN will be attached to the next revision of the drawing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the DCN, which enters an approval workflow.
